title: <div>Elementary to high-school home-school via personalized study &amp games. If
content: Elementary to high-school home-school via personalized study & games. If you're interested in sports, all the curriculum will be thematically sport-centered. If science, or beauty, the same idea. Content will be aligned w diploma requirements & decided on by a three-way vote between teacher, student, & parent.
